response.justification: Despite extensive experience in software development and leadership, the candidate lacks documented C++ experience beyond early career roles and shows no evidence of 8 years of C++ programming, large-scale cloud compute infrastructure, or technical leadership in cloud/DevOps teams — all mandatory qualifications for this role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse systems and languages
Proven track record in open-source leadership and mentoring via workshops
Strong background in distributed systems, CI/CD, and DevOps tooling
concerns: No evidence of 8 years of C++ programming as required
Lacks demonstrable cloud compute platform or distributed systems leadership experience
Minimal mention of software architecture or cloud-native design patterns
